If you want to sell super, super high stuff, this is the funnel we use, is our consulting application funnel. Right? So the first step is very simple. There's a video. And the way we found this works the best is having a video sharing, a case study about your success stories. All you guys have some kind of success stories in your business. So here's how I did this, here's how Julie did this. Mike did this by following my system. So you have some kind of case study video about how great your system is, however it is. And then underneath you have a button saying apply now to come work with me. Click on the application page. Then you take them to a page where they can apply. You got a bunch of questions they fill out. They kind of pre. You guys all went through this process with me. You saw my application page, right? You apply, you fill out a bunch of things and then from there you take them to a homework page. In a homework page. The homework page is designed to pre sell somebody on you. It's a pre frame, right? Do you guys remember my homework page? Okay. What happened when you watched the video on my homework page? Yes. Did it work? Who here cried when they saw my homework page? A couple of you guys. That's my goal. Not that I was trying to make you guys cry, but it's a pre frame for when Robby or Troy or Kimberly picks up the phone the next day. It's a pre frame because if you ended up phone call, listen, I watched that video with Russell. I cried, he cried. We had this emotional experience. Now Robby's saying, hey, I think you should be part of this program. It's going to cost you 8, 15, $25,000. It changes you, right? It's a pre frame. And so the homework page is the pre frame page for the call that's going to be happening the next day. You see how we use these pre frame things all the time, all over the place. So this is our consulting application funnel, okay?
